hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && [ -f "$FILE_PATH" ]; then SIZE=$(wc -c < "$FILE_PATH"); if [ "$SIZE" -gt 500000 ]; then echo "WARNING: File $(basename "$FILE_PATH") is $(( SIZE / 1024 ))KB. Consider reading specific sections (offset/limit) or converting to text first."; fi; fi

FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && [ -f "$FILE_PATH" ]; then cp "$FILE_PATH" "${FILE_PATH}.bak.$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)"; fi

CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+push\s+(-f|--force)|rm\s+-rf\s+/|git\s+checkout\s+--\s+\.|git\s+clean\s+-f|git\s+branch\s+-D'; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive command detected: $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit.*--no-verify'; then echo "BLOCKED: --no-verify not allowed" >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'stata-mp'; then ERRORS=$(echo "$TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -E 'r\([0-9]+\)|no observations|variable .* not found|op\. sys\. refuses|unable to allocate|matsize too small|no; data in memory would be lost' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$ERRORS" ]; then echo "STATA VALIDATION WARNING:"; echo "$ERRORS"; fi; fi

CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'stata-mp'; then LOG=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oP '(?<=do )\S+' | sed 's/\.do$/.log/'); if [ -n "$LOG" ] && [ -f "$LOG" ]; then cp "$LOG" "${LOG%.log}_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log"; fi; fi

FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.tex$'; then cd "$(dirname "$FILE_PATH")" && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error "$(basename "$FILE_PATH")" > /dev/null 2>&1; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "WARNING: LaTeX compilation failed for $(basename "$FILE_PATH")"; fi; fi
notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Waiting for your input' 2>/dev/null || true
